aluation and Real-Time Implementation of Subspace, Adaptive, and DFT Algorithms for Multi-tone Detection Güner Arslan, Brian L. Evans, F. Ayhan Sakarya and José Luis Pino Proceedings of the International Conference on Telecommunications Istanbul, Tur

nal Conference on Telecommunications Istanbul, Turkey April 15-17, 1996 Abstract We evaluate MUSIC, LMS, and the Goertzel algorithms for dual-tone multiple-frequency estimation. We rate their computational requirements, estimation errors, and their c

ional requirements, estimation errors, and their compliance with the CCITT Q.23 and Q.24 standards through MATLAB simulations and real-time implementations on the ADSP-2101 and Motorola 56001 processors. Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Rege
